name: Adrian West
learned: Adrian is a high-ranking politician who has navigated the murky waters of power and influence for decades. He knows how to wield his connections to get what he wants, often stepping into moral grey areas. His charm masks a more ruthless side that emerges when his position is threatened.
currently: Adrian is under scrutiny due to his alleged connections to the murder victims. He continues to play the political game while trying to distance himself from the investigation. He hosts lavish parties to maintain appearances, but behind closed doors, he worries about what the informant might reveal.
lifestyle: Adrian lives extravagantly, with a strict routine that includes morning workouts, meetings with influential figures, and evenings filled with social events. He often indulges in fine dining and expensive wines, spending late nights in the company of other elites, all while keeping an eye on the investigation.
